tasks: From the figure2_gap_means_and_stars.png regression results, what is the point estimate of Gap in Influence on Partner's Ranking for the Mislabeled Woman condition. Only report the number rounded to three decimal places.
From the figure2_gap_means_and_stars.png regression results, in the Correctly Labeled condition, are men more influential than women on all metrics? Report only Yes or No.

From the figure2_gap_means_and_stars.png regression results, what is the point estimate of Gap in Influence on Partner's Thermometer for the Mislabeled Man condition. Only report the number rounded to three decimal places.

From the figure3_convergence_twopanel.png results, what is the point estimate of Thermometer Rating Gap (relative to control) for Mislabeling the Man's Gender condition? Only report the number rounded to three decimal places.
